prompt:
Ultra-realistic 16:9 close-up studio photograph of an Algerian citizenship identity card placed on a clean light grey or soft neutral background. The card is horizontally aligned, centered in frame, captured in sharp macro focus with soft diffused studio lighting.

The design follows an official Algerian government-issued identity document aesthetic with multilingual typography, engraved security artwork, and advanced anti-counterfeit detailing inspired by modern North African national ID systems.

Large bold header at top reads: “الجمهورية الجزائرية الديمقراطية الشعبية” with secondary French title “RÉPUBLIQUE ALGÉRIENNE DÉMOCRATIQUE ET POPULAIRE” and subtitle “CARTE DE CITOYENNETÉ / CITIZENSHIP CARD.”

Top-left corner features the Algerian national flag with red crescent and star emblem. Upper-right includes the national coat of arms of Algeria.

The card contains a passport-style portrait of a young Algerian woman:
– Warm olive North African skin tone with realistic natural texture
– Medium-length dark brown or black hair with soft waves
– Dark brown eyes, neutral expression, direct gaze
– Minimal makeup with documentary realism
– Wearing a dark blazer or black formal top with subtle gold jewelry

Personal identity information displayed in Arabic, French, and English format:
– اللقب / Nom / Surname: BENYAHIA
– الاسم / Prénom / LEÏLA AMEL
– تاريخ الميلاد / Date de naissance / 14 MAI / MAY 1993
– مكان الميلاد / Lieu de naissance / Place of Birth: ALGER, ALGÉRIE
– الجنسية / Nationalité / Nationality: ALGÉRIENNE
– رقم المواطنة / Numéro de citoyenneté / Citizenship Number: DZA1234567
– تاريخ الإصدار / Date de délivrance / Date of Issue: 20 MAI / MAY 2024
– تاريخ الانتهاء / Date d’expiration / Date of Expiry: 20 MAI / MAY 2034
– الجنس / Sexe / Sex: F

Security and design features include:
– Intricate guilloche security line patterns across the entire card surface
– Fine microprinted anti-counterfeit textures
– Holographic foil patches with iridescent rainbow reflections
– Transparent layered security overlays
– Circular “DZA” holographic security seal
– Crescent and star holographic motif integrated into security elements
– Faint outline map of Algeria embedded into background texture
– Detailed engraved illustration of Algiers skyline and Martyrs’ Memorial across the right side
– Decorative geometric Islamic-inspired engraving patterns blended into background
– Machine-readable identity strip along bottom edge
– Signature at bottom: “Leïla A. Benyahia”

Additional design styling:
– Soft green, white, silver, and red gradients inspired by the Algerian flag
– Polycarbonate laminated card texture with realistic reflections and embossed micro-detail
– Modern high-security government document appearance with engraved banknote-style illustration work

Lighting is soft and evenly diffused, emphasizing holographic effects, engraved textures, and realistic print detail without harsh shadows.
